---
title: "DANA 4810 Project Part 3"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-06-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**Course: DANA 4810**

**Team members: Nandini Bhatia, Diego Alberto, Khushpreet Kaur, Haruka Sawakami**

# Instruction Manual
## Cross-validation Techniques
